title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: The creator conducts a structured interrogation of Claude across conceptual "acts" addressing ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation logic. The video frames this as a controlled conversational escalation to expose boundaries in AI system responses without sensationalism.
